name: 瑞士国际主义排版
description: 清晰的网格系统，客观理性的信息呈现
description_en: Clear grid system with objective, rational information presentation

name: 包豪斯
description: 形式追随功能，几何形状与原色
description_en: Form follows function, with geometric shapes and primary colors

name: 网格系统设计
description: 严格的网格布局，有序的信息组织
description_en: Strict grid layout with orderly information organization

name: 扁平化设计
description: 去除阴影和渐变，使用纯色块和简单图形
description_en: No shadows or gradients; solid color blocks and simple shapes

name: Material Design
description: 基于纸张和墨水的隐喻，强调层次和动效
description_en: Paper-and-ink metaphor emphasizing layers and motion

name: 大字报式排版
description: 超大字体作为主视觉，强烈的视觉冲击
description_en: Oversized type as the main visual with strong impact

name: 留白主义
description: 大量留白，让内容呼吸，突出重点
description_en: Ample whitespace lets content breathe and highlights focus

name: 几何构成风
description: 基本几何形状的组合与构成

name: 模块化信息设计
description: 信息模块化组织，清晰的逻辑结构
description_en: Modular information organization with a clear logical structure

name: 数据可视化风
description: 以图表和图形呈现数据的专业风格
description_en: Professional style presenting data via charts and graphics

name: 赛博朋克
description: 高科技与低生活的结合，霓虹与黑暗
description_en: High tech meets low life, neon and darkness
